required_skills: Business operations management and day-to-day operational execution
Process design, documentation, and standard operating procedure (SOP) development
Data analysis and operational metrics tracking
Cross-functional coordination and internal stakeholder communication
Project management and task prioritization in fast-moving environments
SQL for operational data querying and reporting
preferred_skills: Experience with revenue operations (RevOps) or sales operations functions
Familiarity with finance operations including invoicing, AP/AR, and expense management
Exposure to HR operations — onboarding workflows, HRIS management, headcount planning
Knowledge of customer success operations and lifecycle management
Experience implementing or administering business tooling and software stack rationalization
Comfort with automation tools to eliminate manual operational workflows
Prior experience scaling operations in a startup from seed to Series B or beyond
responsibilities: Own and continuously improve day-to-day business operations across departments, ensuring processes run efficiently and teams have the tools and information they need
Design, document, and implement standard operating procedures (SOPs) for recurring business processes across sales, finance, HR, and customer success
Build and maintain operational dashboards that track key business metrics, surfacing anomalies and trends to leadership in weekly business reviews
Manage vendor relationships, software contracts, and procurement workflows, negotiating favorable terms and rationalizing the company's tool stack
Partner with sales and revenue teams to optimize CRM hygiene, pipeline reporting, and lead-to-close operational workflows in Salesforce or HubSpot
Coordinate cross-functional projects involving multiple teams, managing timelines, dependencies, and stakeholder communications to ensure on-time delivery
Support finance operations including monthly close coordination, expense reporting, budget tracking, and headcount reconciliation
Identify and implement automation opportunities using tools like Zapier or Make to eliminate manual, repetitive operational tasks across the business
Assist in onboarding new hires by managing operational checklists, tool provisioning, and coordination with HR, IT, and finance teams
Lead post-mortem analyses on operational failures or delays, identifying root causes and implementing corrective process improvements
